ham.subject: Your Recent Bank Transaction - Account Alert
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of $1,250.00 was successfully processed on your account ending in 4321 on 15 April 2026. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our support immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team
Banco Trust

spam.subject: URGENT: Cryptocurrency Wallet Suspension Notice
spam.body:
Dear valued user,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet associated with the address <URL>. As a result, your wallet has been temporarily suspended to prevent potential unauthorized access. To restore your wallet, please verify your identity by replying to this email with the following information:

- Full name
- Date of birth
- Last 4 digits of your social security number

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent deletion of your wallet and funds. Please act immediately.

Regards,
Security Team
CryptoGuard Inc.
